Links for Today

What Question Do You Want to Ask of the Data?

1. How does nitrate in a Knoxville creek (Second Creek) change over time?

2. How does nitrtate in a Greene County (Cove Creek) change over time?

3. How do the nitrate levels in Knoxville (Second Creek) and Greene County (Cove Creek) compare?

https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSYCmPoxd222OlgfyWYIeUps7Mp4dnrWDDRTCs5PeOCMYp1HrEDKoNwg7mn8Tl0uh-lTBwvAwuIA2eK/pub?gid=0&single=true&output=csv

Knoxville Explorers

How does nitrate in Second Creek change over time?

Group 1 Slides
Group 2 Slides
Group 3 Slides
Group 4 Slides
Group 5 Slides

Prompt for data-formulator.ai

Create a line graph using the data from the CSV. Use only the data whose nitrate source is Knox creek. The X-Axis should be time. The Y-Axis should be nitrate levels (ppm). Show trends clearly and label the graph.

Greene County Explorers

How does nitrate in Cove Creek change over time?

Group 1 Slides
Group 2 Slides
Group 3 Slides
Group 4 Slides
Group 5 Slides

Prompt for data-formulator.ai

Create a line graph using the data from the CSV. Use only the data whose nitrate source is Greene Creek. The X-Axis should be time. The Y-Axis should be nitrate levels (ppm). Show trends clearly and label the graph.

Creek Comparers

Which creek between Knoxville (Second Creek) and Greeneville (Cove Creek) has higher nitrate levels?

Group 1 Slides
Group 2 Slides
Group 3 Slides
Group 4 Slides
Group 5 Slides

Prompt for data-formulator.ai

Create a parallel box plot using the data from the CSV. Compare the nitrate source from each location to the nitrate_ppm. Label the graph.
